paper_title: Determinants of economic growth in the Mekong Delta provinces

entities.description: The main research subject focusing on factors determining the economic development of provinces.
Gross Regional Domestic Product per person, used as the primary indicator for economic growth.
The skills, knowledge, and experience possessed by an individual or population.
The distribution of economic activities and urban agglomeration within a region.
Statistical technique used to analyze the relationship between multiple independent variables and a dependent variable.

entities.id: Aggregate production function of Lin and Song (2002)
entities.description: Theoretical framework used to derive the regression model for economic growth.
A component of the Vietnam Provincial Competitiveness Index used as a proxy for labor quality.

entities.id: Database of 13 provinces in the Mekong Delta (2010-2016)
entities.description: Panel data collected from provincial statistical yearbooks and GSO over a 7-year period.
A survey-based dataset measuring economic governance and administrative procedures in Vietnam.
Statistical result showing the negative impact of population growth on per capita growth.

entities.id: Local government expenditure increase (1%) -> GRDP increase (1.2 - 1.3%)
entities.description: Metric indicating the positive impact of total public spending on economic growth.

entities.id: Labor training index increase (1 point) -> GRDP per capita increase (1.23 - 1.44%)
entities.description: Measurement of the impact of labor quality improvements on economic output.

entities.id: Freight-kilometer increase (1%) -> GDP per capita increase (0.11% - 0.22%)
entities.description: Measurement of the positive impact of transport infrastructure capacity on growth.

entities.id: Urban population density ratio increase (1 unit) -> GRDP per capita increase (1.02 - 1.03%)
entities.description: Measurement of the positive impact of urban agglomeration (spatial structure) on growth.
The study of economic development at the subnational or regional level.
Researcher at the Vietnam Institute for Development Strategies.
Researcher at the Vietnam Institute for Development Strategies.
A research institute under the Ministry of Planning and Investment of Vietnam.
Governmental body responsible for state management of planning and investment in Vietnam.
